a:r.a:t: Fast + Free + Scalable data sources powering EcoTwin Lite
Comprehensive global map data with building footprints, roads, waterways, and elevation data. Updated by millions of contributors worldwide.
Real-time and historical weather data, satellite imagery, climate models, and precipitation forecasts from leading meteorological agencies.
Simulated sensor networks providing real-time data on water levels, temperature, humidity, and air quality for enhanced situational awareness.
Official disaster management protocols, evacuation procedures, emergency response guidelines, and policy documents for RAG retrieval.
